---
title: ""
---

::: {.content-section}

# Curriculum Vitae {.section-heading}

```{=html}
<p>
  <a href="cv/andersen_cv.pdf" target="_blank" class="paper-tag tag-pdf" style="font-size:0.85rem;padding:0.4rem 1rem;">
    ↓ Download CV (PDF)
  </a>
</p>
```

## Positions {.section-heading}

**Associate Professor** — Department of Economics, University of Alberta *(current)*

## Education {.section-heading}

**PhD, Economics** — University of Maryland

## Research Fields {.section-heading}

Environmental and Resource Economics · Public Economics · Sustainable Development

## Selected Publications {.section-heading}

See the [Research](research.qmd) page for a full list of publications and working papers.

## Contact {.section-heading}

Department of Economics
9-23 HM Tory Building
University of Alberta
Edmonton, AB T6G 2H4

[dca@ualberta.ca](mailto:dca@ualberta.ca)

:::
